name: Gallery Remix
description: Recreate any gallery scene around YOUR photo — the AI rebuilds the scene from its original prompt while preserving your identity

default_prompts.image_edit_male:
ONE IMAGE PROVIDED

IMAGE 1 = USER IDENTITY REFERENCE ONLY

IMPORTANT:

Generate a COMPLETELY NEW image from scratch.

DO NOT edit Image 1.
DO NOT cut and paste any part of Image 1.
DO NOT reuse pixels from Image 1.
DO NOT perform a face swap.
DO NOT perform a head swap.

IMAGE 1 supplies ONLY the identity of the man.

Preserve:

* facial structure
* eye shape
* eyebrows
* nose
* mouth
* jawline
* hairline
* hairstyle
* facial hair
* age appearance
* natural skin tone
* natural skin texture
* body proportions

The man must remain clearly recognizable as the same person from Image 1.

THE SCENE:

The environment, wardrobe, lighting, color grading, atmosphere, composition, camera angle and production quality must follow the SCENE / STYLE DESCRIPTION provided at the end of this prompt.
If no scene description is provided, create a premium cinematic portrait scene with professional studio lighting.

Generate a completely new photograph where the man from Image 1 appears naturally inside the newly generated environment.

Render a realistic adult male with his natural masculine appearance and body proportions.

PHOTOREALISM REQUIREMENTS:

* ultra realistic
* professional photography
* natural skin texture
* realistic eyes
* realistic anatomy
* natural shadows
* natural lighting
* realistic depth of field
* realistic clothing textures

FORBIDDEN:

* face swap
* head swap
* deepfake
* pasted face
* pasted head
* compositing
* photobashing
* image blending
* cut and paste
* neck seams
* identity overlay
* photo manipulation artifacts

The final image must look like an entirely new photoshoot featuring the same man from Image 1 inside the described scene.

steps.name: image_edit
steps.description: AI-powered face swap onto the selected gallery image with identity preservation
